title: Ministry of Rural Development Joint  Secretary Pi Tanuka Talukdar Khalkho-in Serchhip District a tlawh.
content:
775/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 30th May 2026:Sawrkar laipui Ministry of Rural Development Joint  Secretary Pi Tanuka Talukdar Khalkho-in May ni 29-30 khan, Serchhip District-a Rural Development Department hnuaia, Mizoram State Rural Livelihood Mission (MzSRLM) hmalakna hrang hrangte a tlawh.

Pi Khalko-i hian Baktawng Tlangnuam-a MzSRLM hmalaknaa Furniture siamna leh Aluminium hmanga bungbêl siamna hmun te, Chhingchhip-a Ropuiliani Women Farmer Producer Company Limited te enkawl Aieng, Sawhthing leh hmarcha sawngbawlna hmun te, Thenzawl-a Vantawng Cluster Level Federation pisa te tlawhin, Self Help Group memberte hmalakna hrang hrangte a tlawh kual bawk a.

Heng hmun hrang hrangte a tlawhkualnaah hian Pi Khalko-i chuan hna thawktute kawmin, an mamawh leh harsatnate a ngaihthlak sak a; MzSRLM hnuaia self help group member-te hmalaknate chu chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin, harsatna an neihte pawh theih ang anga chinfel dan zawnpui a tum thu a hrilh bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: BLO-ten SIR 2026 pualin an bial chhunga in tin an tlawh chhuak ṭan
content:
774/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 30th May, 2026:Chief Electoral Officer, Mizoram chuan thuchhuah hetiang hian thuchhuah a siam:

Vawiin 30.05.2026 (Inrinni) atang hian Special Intensive Revision of Electoral Rolls, 2026 kalpui tan a ni a. District hrang hrang a Booth Level Officer ten anmahni huam chhung theuhah House-to-House visit an nei tan dawn a. House-to-House visit hi ni 28.06.2026 (Chawllhni) thleng neih tur a ni.

BLO ten House-to-House visit an neih chhung hian in tina voter tuna electoral roll-a chuang mek te, Electoral Roll siam thar tura thun dilna Enumeration Form chu voter zawng zawng tan copy 2 theuh an sem ang a. Copy 1 (khat) la letin copy 1(khat) dang leh chu voter ten an kawl dawn a ni. BLO te hian a tul angin voter te Enumeration Form an dah khahpui ang a. Enumeration Form dahkhah sa chu BLO ten an rawn la khawm leh dawn a ni. Hemi bakah hian Enumeration Form an lak khawm saa voter-te detail chu BLO app hmangin online ah an thun leh dawn a ni.

Tun dinhmunah Mizoram chhungah Voter – 875068, Mipa - 423397 Hmeichhia - 451671 kan awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: SCHOOL EDUCATION MINISTER-IN  NEW AGE TECHNOLOGY SKILL LAB A HAWNG
content:
773/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 30th May, 2026:Nimin  khan Govt Model Comprehensive School, Model veng Aizawl-ah School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana'n  New Age Technology Skill Lab a hawng.

Minister chuan Skill Lab hawnna inkhawmah hian thusawiin Bharat Forge te nen thawkhova New Age Technologies zirna Skill Lab an din chu lawmawm a tih thu leh zirlaiten an țangkaipui ngei a beisei thu a sawi a. Skill Lab hawn tak chuan zirlaite zir dan phung a thlak danglam dawn a, Education chu tun hma chuan ziak, chhiar leh vawn a ni mai a, tunah erawhchuan khawvel a inthlak danglam nasa tawh a,  engnge kan siam theih tih leh kan chinfel theih tih hi a ni tawh zawk a ti a.  Robotics sang tak tak te, drone te, 3D printing te Simusoft atanga kan hmuh theih bungrua hrang hrangte hi a tha hlawm hle a,  zirlaiten an thil hriat leh thiam te chu hmuh theiha an chantir theih a beisei thu a sawi a. Bharat Forge ten zirtirtute training pe a, zirlaibu an pe bawk chu a lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan Skill Lab hian hmasawnna thar a rawn thlen dawn a, he technology hi Aizawl khawpui chhunga zirlaite chauh ni lovin Mizoram puma zirlaite tan a ni a ti a. Laboratory enkawltu zirtirtute chu meichher kengtu an ni a ti.  Minister chuan Class VII ațanga class IX zirlaiten robotic khawl an design thei dawn a, hei hian zirna hi a thlak danglam thei dawn a ni a ti bawk.  CSR hmalakna hmang hian hetiang Lab hi  pahnih dang din a ni leh dawn a ni a ti.  Minister chuan Comprehensive AI Education Programme for School tih zirlaibu a tlangzarh nghal bawk.

He huna khual zahawm Dr Leena Deshpande Vice President & Head CSR Bharat Forge pawhin thu a sawi a, Bharat forge chu thilsiamtu industry a nih thu te, khawl chi hrang hrang part lirthei leh thlawhna thlenga siamtu a nih thu te, hmun hrang hranga  hna an thawh dan leh hmachhawp te a sawi a. Bharat Forge te hian thingtlang hmasawnna tur leh skill development atan hma an la mek a, tehfung chi hrang hrang hmangin thingtlang 130 ah hmalakna tur an thlang a, chung zingah chuan Mizoram chhunga khaw pakhat a tel a, an khaw mamawh an survey-na ațangin ruahtui khawlna siam a ni dawn a ni a ti.  Tuna skill Lab hawn thar takah chuan power supply a khaihlak loh nan  solar inverter an bun tur thu a sawi bawk.

Special Guest Pu David Lalthantluanga Secretary Planning & Programme Implementation pawhin  CSR Cell  hnathawh dan hrang hrangte leh an țangkai dan te  a sawi bawk.

Pi Angela Zothanpuii Director School Education kaihhruai he  Technology Skill Lab hawnnaah hian Pi Ramdinliani Secretary School Education chuan lawmthu sawiin Bharat Forge te nen thawk hova hetiang technology zirna skill Lab din a lo ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu leh roh taka enkawl tura a duh thu sawiin zirlaiten țangkaipui ngei tura a duhsak thu a sawi.

Mizoram sorkar leh Bharat Forge te chuan thawk dunin CSR kaltlangin he Technologies Lab hi an din a, Bharat Forge hnuai atang hian Simusoft Technologies te chuan Skill Lab din hna an thawk a, software hmanga Robot khawl chi hrang hrang hnathawk thei tura design dan zirna a ni. Industry lian tak taka khawl hmanga hna an thawh dan te, mamawh dan a zira khawl siam dan turte he skill lab atang hian an zir dawn a ni.

Vawiina New Age Technology Skill Lab hawnnaah hian School Education Department a officer te, Mizo Language Development Board Chairman te, Science & Technology officer te, Samagra Shiksha Officer te, Bharat Forge Vice President te, Simusoft Technician leh School zirtirtute leh zirlai te an tel a ni.

title: Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan National Conference for Kharif Campaign-ah thu a sawi
content:
772/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 30th May, 2026:Nimin May ni 29, 2026 khan Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan, National Conference on Agriculture for Kharif Campaign, New Delhi-a neihah thu a sawi.

National Conference for Kharif Campaign hi India rama agriculture kaihhnawih conference pawimawh tak niin, central sorkara Agriculture Minister leh official pawimawh tak tak bakah, state hrang hrang Minister te leh official te an tel a ni.

Agriculture Minister Pu PC Vanlalruata chuan Mizoram tlangram angah chuan a fur a thala zawh theih feh kawng (all-weather farm road) neih a pawimawhzia a sawi a. India hmarchhakah ruah tui a tam avangin, kuthnathawktute’n an huan ram panna tur kalkawng tha an mamawh hle a; kalkawng tha zawk an neih theihnan central sorkar thawhpuiah a sawm. Minister chuan ruahtui khawlna tur tuizem lian zawk leh tha zawk te pawh Mizoramin a mamawh thu a sawi a; Price Support Scheme hnuaia behliang, chhawchhi leh nihawi te lei tan a nih tur thu te sawiin, central sorkar hotute hnenah lawmthu a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan Mizoram-ah district thar 3 a awm tak avangin KVK thar 3 mamawh belh a nih thu te sawiin, KVK thar dinna tur proposal pawh thehluh a ni tawh a, approval a chhuah vat theihnan central sorkar tanpuina a ngen nghal bawk.

Mizoram chu India ram hmun dang, phai lam te ang lo takin tlangram leilung leh boruak dai nuam tak nei a nih avangin, central scheme te pawh kan ram leilung mila tihdanglam theih ni se tiin rawtna a thlen a, farmer te’n hma an lo sawn zel theihnan central sorkar chu theihtawp chhuaha thawhpui a inhuam thu a sawi.

Conference-ah hian fur thlai chin dan tur (kharif season) leh a kaihhnawih hrang hrang te sawi ho a ni a. Fertilizer hman fimkhur a tulzia te, natural farming ngaih pawimawh a tulzia te leh, India ramin ram dang atanga edible oil a lak luh titlem tura, oilseeds lama tan lak a tulzia te an sawi.

Conference-ah hian Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare Department atangin Pu Lalnunhlua, Addl Secretary; Pu B Ramnunsanga, Addl Director leh Pu Simon Rosangliana, Deputy Director te’n Minister hi an tawiawm a ni.

Attachment

title: ​UNION MINISTER SHRI MANOHAR LAL REVIEWS THE WORK OF UD&PA AND P&E DEPARTMENTS
content:
127/2026-2027

Aizawl, 29 May 2026 :A State Review Meeting on Power and Housing & Urban Affairs was held today at the MINECO Conference Hall under the chairmanship of Union Minister for Power and Minister for Housing and Urban Affairs, Shri Manohar Lal. The meeting was attended by Mizoram's Minister for Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA), Pu K. Sapdanga, and Minister for Power & Electricity (P&E), Pu F. Rodingliana, along with officials from the UD&PA and P&E Departments.

During the meeting, Union Minister Shri Manohar Lal reviewed issues relating to electricity revenue collection and urged officials of the Power & Electricity Department to take necessary measures to ensure full recovery of electricity dues. He emphasized the importance of beginning the installation of Smart Meters in government buildings and major commercial establishments. He also highlighted the need to introduce a security deposit system under the prepaid electricity metering programme to improve revenue collection.

The Union Minister stated that electricity is a critical driver of economic growth and stressed the importance of effective planning for both power conservation and power generation. He encouraged the department to place greater emphasis on solar energy generation. He further informed the meeting that discussions would be pursued in Delhi with P&E Minister Pu F. Rodingliana regarding proposals to establish hydroelectric power projects on the Tlawng, Tuivai and Chhimtuipui rivers.

Following his interaction with officials of the UD&PA and P&E Departments, Shri Manohar Lal addressed the media. He noted that the Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM) has completed ten years and that Mizoram has progressed beyond Open Defecation Free (ODF) status to achieve ODF+ status. He stated that discussions were held on further strengthening solid waste management systems. The Union Minister assured continued support from the Central Government to enable sustained progress in urban cleanliness, waste segregation, sanitation and hygiene.

The meeting also reviewed the status of the power sector in Mizoram. It was reported that Smart Meter installation has reached 18.01% of the targeted coverage in the state. Under the Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme (RDSS), efforts are ongoing to strengthen the state's power distribution grid. Out of the target of 292,081 Smart Meters, a total of 52,886 Smart Meters have already been installed.

The meeting was informed that the Power & Electricity Department has initiated the process of converting electricity consumers to the prepaid metering system, beginning with departmental offices. A Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for the programme has already been finalized. It was also announced that all early adopters of the prepaid metering system will be eligible for a 2% rebate.

Attachment
